overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai riding a horse up a snowy mountain shrine path. The character passes through multiple red torii gates and approaches a large burning brazier in a heavy snowstorm.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain shrine approach with red torii gates

events.description: horse passes under the first large red torii gate entering the sacred grounds
horse transitions from flat path to slight uphill incline

agents.ego_description: samurai character riding a horse at a steady trot up the snowy mountain path

entered.detail: large red wooden torii gate with sacred bells hanging from the lintel
traditional Japanese stone lantern covered in snow
large boulders and rocky outcrops blanketed in snow
brass bells hanging from the torii gate structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a samurai on horseback approaching a red torii gate in a heavy snowstorm. The camera follows from behind as the horse passes under the gate and continues up the winding mountain path flanked by snow-covered rocks and stone lanterns.

scene_state.functional_zone: shrine corridor between torii gates with burning brazier ahead

events.description: passes through the lower torii gate and approaches the middle gate
large burning brazier becomes visible ahead, casting warm orange light
passes through middle torii gate, upper shrine gate becomes visible

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride uphill, navigating between torii gates toward the burning shrine structure

entered.detail: second red torii gate marking the middle section of the shrine approach
large wooden structure with intense flames providing warmth and light
stone steps leading up to the upper shrine level
final red torii gate at the top of the stairs near the fire

segments.scene_description: The horse continues uphill through a second torii gate as a large burning brazier comes into view in the distance. The path transitions from snow to exposed stone cobbles, and the lighting shifts from cool blue to a mix of firelight and snow-reflected daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep stone stairway passing the burning brazier

events.description: horse begins climbing the steep stone stairs toward the upper shrine
passes through the upper torii gate and alongside the burning brazier
fire passes out of view behind, returning to predominantly cool snowy lighting

agents.ego_description: carefully guiding the horse up the steep stone stairs, passing close to the flames

entered.detail: snow-covered mountain peaks visible through the falling snow in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the horse climbing steep stone stairs past the upper torii gate and the burning brazier. The camera passes close to the flames, which illuminate the falling snow before being left behind as the path continues upward into the misty mountain peaks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate, snow-swept mountain trail toward a glowing spiritual sanctuary amidst the peaks. It begins behind a samurai on horseback as they pass under a red torii gate, winding upward through a heavy snowstorm flanked by stone lanterns and frozen rocks. As the horse continues its ascent through a second gate, the terrain transitions from deep snow to exposed stone cobbles while the cool blue lighting begins to blend with the distant glow of a burning brazier. The scene then shifts as the horse climbs steep stone stairs, passing closely by the roaring flames that illuminate the falling snow. Finally, the camera leaves the fire behind, following the path as it disappears upward into the misty mountain heights.
